title: Believer
why_this_song: High-energy chorus repeats 'pain / you made me a believer' — great for teaching past simple of irregular verbs and present perfect of 'make'.
grammar_callouts: You made me a believer — past simple + object + complement

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in the chorus:

exercises.model_answer_pt: Você me fez um crente / Você me fez acreditar
exercises.teacher_note: Two natural PT translations — discuss nominal ('crente') vs verbal ('acreditar') rendering.

exercises.prompt_en: The song says pain made the singer stronger. Do you agree that difficult experiences make people stronger? Why?
exercises.prompt_pt: A música diz que a dor fez o cantor ficar mais forte. Você concorda que experiências difíceis fortalecem as pessoas? Por quê?

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** The percussive rhythm helps students internalize stress on 'PAIN' and 'BE-liever' — useful for prosody practice. Watch the volume at the chorus; some learners find it overwhelming.
